2026-03-03PMOOther Than Statutory AuthorityOrder fixing certain conditions of employment for the Deputy Secretary to the Cabinet (Economic Policy) and Economic Advisor to the Clerk of the Privy Council, Privy Council OfficeOrder fixing certain conditions of employment of John McArthur, Deputy Secretary to the Cabinet (Economic Policy) and Economic Advisor to the Clerk of the Privy Council, Privy Council Office, for the period commencing on February 2, 2026 and ending on June 30, 2026.N/A
subject: Order fixing certain conditions of employment for the Deputy Secretary to the Cabinet (Economic Policy) and Economic Advisor to the Clerk of the Privy Council, Privy Council Office
precis: Order fixing certain conditions of employment of John McArthur, Deputy Secretary to the Cabinet (Economic Policy) and Economic Advisor to the Clerk of the Privy Council, Privy Council Office, for the period commencing on February 2, 2026 and ending on June 30, 2026.
